headline: How The Investment Story For Kimco Realty (KIM) Is Shifting With New Analyst Views
summary: Kimco Realty’s latest analyst update focuses on small adjustments to fair value, with the model price target moving from US$24.85 to US$24.88. Research commentary around the name reflects a mix of higher and lower targets across the low to high US$20s, often tied to sector views on retail REITs and shopping centers rather than company specific shifts alone. As you read on, you will see how these price target tweaks fit into a broader narrative you can track over time. Analyst Price Targets...

headline: Panic In REITs Is Creating Generational Opportunities
